name: Twinkie Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a pyrex square or rectangular casserole with butter.
2. Cut 8 Twinkies in thirds, lengthwise, and place one layer on the bottom of the casserole.
3. Beat egg whites with cream of tartar and sugar, adding vanilla. Melt chocolate chips in a double boiler.
4. Add egg yolks to the melted chocolate, stirring slowly over boiling water.
5. Fold the chocolate into the egg whites.
6. Spread over Twinkies, then sprinkle with about half of the chopped pecans.
7. Layer more Twinkies, more chocolate, and more nuts.
8. Continue layering until all ingredients are used.
9. Top with whipped cream and a single whole Twinkie.
10. Chill and serve.
